user.title: Create Periodic Min/Max
user.description: Create a sensor that is the minimum or maximum of another sensor, resetttable via an action.

data_description.entity_id: The entity that the sensor will track. The sensor will calculate the minimum or maximum value of this entity until reset via the `reset` action.
data_description.equal_updates: If enabled, the sensor will update the `last_modified` attribute even if the input entity value is the same as the current min/max.
data_description.type: Whether the sensor should track the minimum or maximum value of the input entity

data_description.entity_id: The entity that the sensor will track. The sensor will calculate the minimum or maximum value of this entity until reset via the `reset` action.
data_description.equal_updates: If enabled, the sensor will update the `last_modified` attribute even if the input entity value is the same as the current min/max.
data_description.type: Whether the sensor should track the minimum or maximum value of the input entity

reset.name: Reset
reset.description: Reset a Periodic Min/Max sensor to the current input entity value.
